title: Myrmechis quadrilobata

intro: Myrmechis quadrilobata, commonly known as the "ant orchid," is a species of terrestrial orchid found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a possible treatment for various conditions such as wounds and skin infections.
